title: Palladium
description:
Another optimizing mod, provides deduplication, improved memory control, shader/chunk/nbt optimizations and enchanced mob AI.

Full compatible with Sodium/Forks, Lithium/Forks, Iris/Forks
body:
# [DISCONTINUED] **I'll be archiving this mod. I want to spend more time on MM, but I don't want a bunch of bugs from my other projects to get in the way of users' experience. The useful features will be ported over to [NumFlux](https://modrinth.com/mod/numflux)(server) & [GPUBooster](https://modrinth.com/mod/gputape)(client). That way, I should have enough time for these three projects.** *** ![fo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8457cf2b01e18302ef61da3256328bfb4b94ad14.png) ![fa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c152554bb3141433b6dca087131f96f00a876ba.png) ![qu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/554809ee9ae740db0707b7cd1420d937b490cd6b.png) ![neo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d6378864df2d8f2699289ec7f439e26b5c8db60.png)
![i](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca0de18375553419eff9ce315dccceb885971010.png) ![pull](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/702dd4310f1da518cfe1eb65953281f022b75e05.png)
**Tests on 1.20.2 without any optimizing mods.**

Vanilla: ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd2b33532dcd51c4cf5cbcef02a5288bf9579f88.png) Palladium: ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33a5b8f599a3a0a1a9e377854979a3ed098accc6.png) **World loading/creation time(seconds) comparison table(1.1.1+):** | | Vanilla | Palladium | |--------------|-----------|-----| | World creation | 08.92 | 08.06 | | World loading | 02.96 | 02.71 | # Features ⭐: **Deduplication - Removes duplicates of:** - Resource key - Resource location - Verticies **Mob AI:**
Improve cat and wolf attack AI
Improve wolf and rabbit flee AI **Shaders:**
Mod caches uniforms, shaderi's, shaderi logs of shaders, reducing the number of times they are invoked.
Full compatible with Sodium/Forks, Lithium/Forks, Iris/Forks ~~and shader-packs~~ the shaders work but with bugs, I'm working on it... **Chunk building optimization:**
Optimizes work with chunks.
The results are in the table above. **NBT optimization:**
Slightly improves work with the main storage file format(.nbt) And a few more minor fixes/improves... # FAQ Q: Do you plan to release palladium on [insert version or loader]?
A: Palladium will be 100% available over time on versions 1.20 and above on: - neoforge - quilt - fabric - forge(<1.21)
Q: Curseforge release?
A: Maybe, when I have a little more free time. Q: The mod does not give the effect as in the tests, why, is it cheating?
A: The effect depends on the number of mods, pc configuration and much more, do not expect that it will be identical to the tests above. Q: Will you support 1.20 or any other version when it becomes obsolete?
A: Yes, there will be bug-fixes for sure, but the priority will be lower than popular versions. Q: Updates take a long time to come out, why is that?
A: At the moment, in addition to GPUTape, H+, Palladium and ToadLib, I have two rather large mods, and I work on all of them alone. **Available languanges: 🌐** - English(en_us) - Mr.Toad - Russian(ru_ru) - Mr.Toad, mpustovoi - Traditional Chinese(zh_tw, partial on 1.1+) - yichifauzi - German(de_de, partial on 1.1+) - NextRaven10 - Turkish(tr_tr) - MissionWAR - Ukrainian(uk_ua) - StarmanMine142 - Mexican Spanish(es_mx) - TheLegendofSaram
Want to add localization? Welcome to github-pulll requests! For in game config(<1.1.0): - on forge needs embeddium 0.3.20+. - on neoforged needs embeddium - on fabric/quilt needs sodium Other my mods: - [H+](https://modrinth.com/mod/h_plus)(Hardcore improve) - [EnlightenedBlockEntities/EBEReforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe-forge)(Fork of enchanced block entities)[DISCONTINUED] - [GPUTape](https://modrinth.com/mod/gputape/)(Optimizing) - [MovieMaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/moviemaker)(Content)
